    freebsd-update(8): Explain conflicts in /etc

    Unlike etcupdate(8), freebsd-update only prints the files with
    conflicts. It doesn't merge.

    PR: 204549
    Reviewed by: imp
    Pull Request: https://github.com/freebsd/freebsd-src/pull/826
